_documentation.generated_at: ISO timestamp when this file was produced.
_documentation.filters_applied: The filter values active when this snapshot was exported (empty = no filter).
_documentation.summary.total_permits: Count of individual permit submissions after filters.
_documentation.summary.total_building_groups: Count of distinct buildings, where a building = the case-number prefix (e.g. ROP-NSD-36653). Multiple submissions for one building collapse into one group.
_documentation.summary.geocoded_groups: Building-groups that have map coordinates (address was successfully geocoded).
_documentation.summary.ungeocoded_groups: Building-groups with no coordinates yet (address not geocoded or not found); not shown on the map.
_documentation.summary.distinct_investors: Number of unique non-empty investor strings among the filtered permits.
_documentation.summary.date_min: Earliest permit CreatedDate among the filtered permits.
_documentation.summary.date_max: Latest permit CreatedDate among the filtered permits.
_documentation.permits_by_status: Permit counts keyed by registry status (StatusName).
_documentation.permits_by_submission_type: Permit counts keyed by submission type (SubmissionTypeName), e.g. building permit, use permit.
_documentation.permits_by_year: Permit counts keyed by the year of CreatedDate.
_documentation.top_investors_by_permit_count: Up to 20 investors with the most permits (key = investor, value = permit count).
_documentation.groups: One entry per building-group. permit_count = submissions for that building; lat/lon = map position (null if not geocoded); first_date/last_date = span of its submissions; case_numbers = all submission numbers in the group.
